experiment_card.research_question: Can a long-context LLM method extract reusable trading judgment from messy trader text without losing grounding?
experiment_card.hypothesis: A single controlled long-context read may produce a small set of reusable trading judgment proposals while preserving enough source linkage to identify unsupported or over-abstracted claims.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Before any run, validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately approved live run, evaluate only the resulting ArtifactEnvelope records with schema_check and human_placeholder review for source grounding, teacher-intent preservation, unsupported claims, and over-abstraction. No evaluation result exists in this planning packet.
